overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a mountain trail through grassy meadows and rocky terrain. The character progresses from a stone-walled path through open grassland toward a dense pine forest, with a majestic snow-capped mountain gradually revealing itself in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain trail with a stone wall to his left side

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left edge of the trail
winding dirt path through the grassland
dense evergreen forest covering the distant hills
tall green and brown grass covering the rolling terrain
tall leafless dead tree standing prominently on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt mountain trail bordered by a stone wall on the left. The path winds through open grassland toward a distant pine forest, with a distinctive dead tree visible on the horizon ahead. The sky is partly cloudy with diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with emerging mountain vista

events.description: snow-capped mountain becomes visible in the distance as the terrain opens up

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the open meadow as the landscape opens to reveal distant peaks

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak emerging from behind the distant hills

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stone wall, Geralt traverses open grassland with the dead tree drawing closer. Around the 25-second mark, a magnificent snow-capped mountain reveals itself in the distance to the left, dramatically expanding the vista as the trail continues toward the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail approaching dense pine forest

events.description: trail surface transitions from dirt to rocky gravel as approaching the forest edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking on increasingly rocky terrain with the pine forest drawing near on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes noticeably rockier as Geralt approaches the tree line. The snow-capped mountain dominates the left side of the frame while the pine forest, previously distant, now looms close on the right. The dead tree landmark is passed and falls behind as the character continues toward the forest edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that evolves from a confined stone-walled path into a vast, open vista dominated by a snow-capped peak. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail bordered by a stone wall, winding through open grassland toward a distant pine forest and a solitary dead tree. As the stone wall recedes, the landscape expands to reveal a magnificent snow-capped mountain emerging in the distance to the left, dramatically broadening the horizon. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes noticeably rockier, with the distant pine forest looming closer on the right while the mountain continues to dominate the skyline. Finally, the camera passes the dead tree landmark, leaving it behind as the character reaches the edge of the dense forest.
